fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-07.description: Fix: persist brightness, colour temperature, and on/off state across restarts. Build passed. Issue #104 created with PR draft (GitHub Actions cannot create PRs).

fix-all-monitors-colortemp-init-2026-07-.description: Fix: apply colour temperature when enabling all-monitors mode. Adds UpdateAdditionalMonitorWindows() call at end of ShowOnAllMonitors(). Build passed. PR attempted via safeoutputs.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI

notes: 2026-07-02 run (01:28 UTC): Tasks 3+2. Task 3: Found genuine bug in ShowOnAllMonitors() - when creating new per-monitor windows, colour temperature is not applied (hardcoded neutral gradient). Fix: add UpdateAdditionalMonitorWindows() call after loop. Branch repo-assist/fix-all-monitors-colortemp-init-2026-07-02, build passed. Task 2: Only real user issue is #24 (HDR support), already commented twice with no new human activity - nothing to add. 2026-07-01 run (13:38 UTC): Created brightness/colortemp persistence fix branch, commented on #24 HDR investigation.
